hero.title: Smart Agents. Automated Service.
hero.subtitle: Aura answers your phones, books your jobs, chases your invoices, and grows your business — 24/7.
hero.wordmarkTagline: Never miss another call, another job, or another 5-star review — Aura answers, books, and follows up so you don't have to.

sections.underTheHoodSubtitle: The operative network that powers every promise above.
sections.consolesSubtitle: Purpose-built consoles give your team full control over AI operative operations.
sections.multiChannelSubtitle: Voice, chat, email, SMS — one 24/7 workforce capturing every lead while your team is in the field.
sections.industriesTitle: AI Automation for Field Service Industries
sections.industriesSubtitle: 25 industry categories. 185+ business types. White-label AI that intercepts every inquiry and books directly to your calendar.
sections.subscriptionPlansSubtitle: Pick your automation level. Bring your own voice, SMS, email, research, payment, and social accounts — each billed directly by the provider, never marked up by us.
sections.auditLink: We offer a complimentary audit to help determine which plans best fit your business needs →

agents.AI Receptionist: Answers every call, figures out what the customer needs, and either handles it or hands it straight to the right agent.
agents.Booking Agent: Checks your calendar and books the job at a time that actually works.
agents.Follow-Up Agent: Nudges customers before and after the visit so no one gets forgotten.
agents.Review Agent: Asks happy customers for a Google or Yelp review at the right moment.
agents.Assignment Agent: Picks the right person for each job based on skills, load, and who is free.
agents.Routing Agent: Builds the shortest drive between stops so your team spends less time in traffic.
agents.ETA Agent: Tells the customer when you will actually arrive — and updates them if it slips.
agents.Check-In Agent: Logs when a tech starts, what they did, and when they wrap.
agents.Admin Agent: Manages your team's logins and settings, so you control who can see and change what.
agents.Quoting Agent: Turns a phone call or a photo into a clean estimate the customer can approve.
agents.Invoice Agent: Sends the invoice, chases the payment, and keeps the numbers straight.
agents.Inventory Agent: Watches your parts and materials and tells you when it's time to reorder.
agents.Insights Agent: Ask it a plain-English question about your business and get a straight answer.
agents.Performance Agent: Shows how your team is doing this week — who is crushing it, who needs help.
agents.Revenue Agent: Tracks the money in, the money out, and where your margin actually lives.
agents.Forecast Agent: Predicts your busy weeks so you can staff up before the phone rings.
agents.Campaign Agent: Runs email and SMS campaigns end to end — draft, schedule, send, measure.
agents.Lead Agent: Scores new leads by how likely they are to book, so you call the hot ones first.
agents.Marketing Agent: Runs promos, referrals, and win-backs so lapsed customers come home.
agents.Outreach Agent: Reaches out to prospects who haven't replied yet and keeps the pipeline moving.
agents.Social Scheduler Agent: Posts your content on the schedule you approved, using your own connected social account.
agents.Social Analytics Agent: Tells you what posts landed, what fell flat, and where your audience is growing.
agents.Creative Content Agent: Writes the posts, emails, and website copy in your voice — you approve, it publishes.
agents.Web Presence Agent: Builds and updates your website, blog, and SEO in the background so you stay found.

dataOwnership: Your data is always yours — export everything, anytime, right from Settings.
